page_content:
GATEWAY REQUIREMENT

MATH120/140/136, BMGT220, and

BMGT230 must be completed with a C-

or higher by 45 credits (AP/IB credits

excluded).

NOTES:

1 BMGT110 is only required for students who enter the Smith School of Business as freshmen. It is recommended for transfer students but not required because the course's content is redundant for students who have not completed the course prior to entering the Smith School.

2 All students must complete two Distributive Studies (DSxx) courses that are also approved as Big Question (SCIS) courses. Students must also fulfill two Understanding Plural Societies (DVUP) courses or one Understanding Plural Societies (DVUP) course and one Cultural Competence (DVCC) course with courses from Distributive Studies (DSxx). 3 Students in the iTBT Fellows Program should complete BMGT301F in Year 1 Spring, BMGT302F in Year 2 Fall, and BMGT402F in Year 2 Spring.

|

|

Business (Information Systems) – Effective Spring 2025
